segments.speaker: Receptionist
segments.text: Clinic front desk. How can I help you?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, I'd like to make an appointment. I'm not feeling well.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I've had a fever and a sore throat since yesterday, and it's getting worse.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, through my university. I can bring the card or upload it if needed.

segments.speaker: Receptionist
segments.text: We have an opening tomorrow at 10:30.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That works. Is there anything I should bring besides my insurance card and ID?

segments.speaker: Receptionist
segments.text: Bring a list of medications you're taking.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay. If my symptoms get worse tonight, should I go to urgent care?

segments.speaker: Receptionist
segments.text: Yes, especially if you have trouble breathing or a high fever.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Understood. Thank you for your help.
